markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new team members to GrowthX's product strategy, technology stack, and development approach.](https://fathom.video/share/ERcH65EQYY7cZsWuG1w89mryWmNsAWn-?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX focuses on "service as software", using AI to reduce manual work while maintaining human creativity](https://fathom.video/share/ERcH65EQYY7cZsWuG1w89mryWmNsAWn-?tab=summary&timestamp=379.0)
  - [The company is building a flexible AI workflow engine and content creation platform to replace multiple existing tools](https://fathom.video/share/ERcH65EQYY7cZsWuG1w89mryWmNsAWn-?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [Engineering team is split between platform development and client-specific workflow/integration needs](https://fathom.video/share/ERcH65EQYY7cZsWuG1w89mryWmNsAWn-?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)
  - [Continuous feedback from the delivery team is crucial for product development and improvement](https://fathom.video/share/ERcH65EQYY7cZsWuG1w89mryWmNsAWn-?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)

## Topics

### Company Strategy and Product Philosophy

  - [Shifted from traditional product development to "service as software" model](https://fathom.video/share/ERcH65EQYY7cZsWuG1w89mryWmNsAWn-?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Focus on outcomes and client success rather than specific tools](https://fathom.video/share/ERcH65EQYY7cZsWuG1w89mryWmNsAWn-?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [Leveraging AI to reduce manual work while maintaining human creativity in the process](https://fathom.video/share/ERcH65EQYY7cZsWuG1w89mryWmNsAWn-?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Building flexible solutions to accommodate diverse client needs and rapid AI advancements](https://fathom.video/share/ERcH65EQYY7cZsWuG1w89mryWmNsAWn-?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)

### Current Technology Stack

  - [Multiple tools in use: Notion, AirOps, AirTable, Slack, Google Docs, various CMS](https://fathom.video/share/ERcH65EQYY7cZsWuG1w89mryWmNsAWn-?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)
  - [Custom-built workflow engine for AI-powered content creation tasks](https://fathom.video/share/ERcH65EQYY7cZsWuG1w89mryWmNsAWn-?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
  - [Integration with third-party services (e.g., Perplexity, SEMrush) for research and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/ERcH65EQYY7cZsWuG1w89mryWmNsAWn-?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)

### AI Workflow Engine

  - [Allows rapid creation of custom workflows for content creation and other tasks](https://fathom.video/share/ERcH65EQYY7cZsWuG1w89mryWmNsAWn-?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Engineers can quickly develop workflows using a simple text-based description](https://fathom.video/share/ERcH65EQYY7cZsWuG1w89mryWmNsAWn-?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
  - [Future plans to create a user-friendly interface for non-technical team members to create and modify workflows](https://fathom.video/share/ERcH65EQYY7cZsWuG1w89mryWmNsAWn-?tab=summary&timestamp=1967.0)

### Content OS Platform (In Development)

  - [Aims to replace AirOps, AirTable, and potentially Notion](https://fathom.video/share/ERcH65EQYY7cZsWuG1w89mryWmNsAWn-?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [Will provide an integrated environment for content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/ERcH65EQYY7cZsWuG1w89mryWmNsAWn-?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [Features include customizable pipelines, chat-like interfaces for content iteration, and seamless workflow integration](https://fathom.video/share/ERcH65EQYY7cZsWuG1w89mryWmNsAWn-?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)

### Upcoming Features and Improvements

  - [Task Hub: Integration with freelancer marketplaces for specific workflow steps](https://fathom.video/share/ERcH65EQYY7cZsWuG1w89mryWmNsAWn-?tab=summary&timestamp=2580.0)
  - [Learning system: Automatically collect and analyze edits and improvements for model fine-tuning](https://fathom.video/share/ERcH65EQYY7cZsWuG1w89mryWmNsAWn-?tab=summary&timestamp=2662.0)
  - [Micro-apps: Standalone tools (e.g., researcher, image search, fact-checker) for potential use by other agencies](https://fathom.video/share/ERcH65EQYY7cZsWuG1w89mryWmNsAWn-?tab=summary&timestamp=2710.0)

### Engineering Team Structure

  - [Split into two groups:](https://fathom.video/share/ERcH65EQYY7cZsWuG1w89mryWmNsAWn-?tab=summary&timestamp=2734.0)
    1.  Platform development team (Content OS, AI Workflow Engine)
    2.  Client ops engineers for workflow needs, client-specific integrations, and micro-app development

## Next Steps

  - [New team members should explore the Flow Studio platform (facts.ai) using credentials in 1Password](https://fathom.video/share/ERcH65EQYY7cZsWuG1w89mryWmNsAWn-?tab=summary&timestamp=3000.0)
  - [Continuously share feedback, challenges, and improvement ideas in the engineering feedback Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/ERcH65EQYY7cZsWuG1w89mryWmNsAWn-?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
  - [Engineering team to focus on developing Content OS and AI Workflow Engine in the first half of the year](https://fathom.video/share/ERcH65EQYY7cZsWuG1w89mryWmNsAWn-?tab=summary&timestamp=2629.0)
  - [Task Hub and learning system development planned for the second half of the year](https://fathom.video/share/ERcH65EQYY7cZsWuG1w89mryWmNsAWn-?tab=summary&timestamp=2624.0)
